title: TpaPlus
description: TPAplus is a Minecraft plugin that enhances the teleportation request system, adding features like teleport delays, TPA requests, and TPAhere request.
body:
### 📌 About TPAplus ### TPAplus is a powerful and easy-to-use teleportation plugin that enhances the TPA system in Minecraft. Players can request teleports to each other, accept or deny requests—all with a smooth and customizable experience. ---
Spoiler - This plugin was designed to provide a better and more flexible TPA system, with more control, optimizations, and a feature-rich configuration. If you've ever felt that other TPA plugins didn’t meet your needs, TPAplus is here to change that!

## ⚡ Features - ✅ Teleport Requests – Send TPA requests to other players with /tpa and /tpahere . - ✅ Teleportation Delay – Configurable delay before teleportation for a balanced experience. - ✅ Request Management – Accept, deny, or cancel teleport requests easily. - ✅ Configurable Permissions – Full control over who can teleport, accept, and deny requests.
## 🔧 Commands & Permissions Command Permission Description Default | פקודה | הרשאה | תיאור | Default | |--------------|------------------------|---------------------------------|-----------| | `/tpa ` | `tpaplus.tpa` | Send a teleport request. | User | | `/tpaccept ` | `tpaplus.tpaccept` | Accepts a teleport request. | User | | `/tpadeny ` | `tpaplus.tpadeny` | Denies a teleport request. | User | | `/tpahere ` | `tpaplus.tpahere` | Request a player to teleport to you.| User | | `/tpacancel ` | `tpaplus.tpacancel` | Cancels an outgoing request. | User |
## 🌍 Supported Versions - This plugin is tested on the latest versions of Spigot & Paper. While it might work on older versions, only the latest Minecraft release is officially supported.
💡 Need a better teleportation experience? TPAplus is the solution! 🚀
